name: Ransomware Incident Response
description: Comprehensive playbook for responding to ransomware attacks, based on SANS incident response methodology

steps.title: Isolate Affected Systems
steps.description: Immediately disconnect affected systems from the network to prevent spread. Do not power off devices as this may destroy evidence.

steps.title: Notify Leadership
steps.description: Alert CEO, CISO, and legal counsel about the incident. Initiate crisis management protocol.

steps.title: Preserve Evidence
steps.description: Take forensic images of affected systems. Document ransom notes, screen captures, and network logs.

steps.title: Identify Ransomware Variant
steps.description: Analyze the ransomware to determine variant, encryption method, and potential decryption options.

steps.title: Assess Impact
steps.description: Determine scope of encryption, affected data, systems, and business impact. Identify backup status.

steps.title: Contact Law Enforcement
steps.description: Report incident to FBI, local law enforcement, and cybersecurity authorities.

steps.title: Evaluate Payment Decision
steps.description: Consult with legal, insurance, and executive team on whether to pay ransom. Document decision rationale.

steps.title: Initiate Recovery
steps.description: Restore systems from clean backups or use decryption tools if available. Verify system integrity.

steps.title: Employee Communication
steps.description: Notify affected employees, provide guidance on security measures, and address concerns.

steps.title: Post-Incident Review
steps.description: Conduct lessons learned session, update security controls, and improve incident response procedures.

name: Phishing Attack Response
description: Step-by-step response to phishing attacks targeting employees

steps.title: Verify Phishing Report
steps.description: Confirm the email is indeed a phishing attempt. Analyze headers, links, and attachments.

steps.title: Identify Affected Users
steps.description: Search email logs to identify all recipients of the phishing email.

steps.title: Quarantine Emails
steps.description: Remove phishing emails from all mailboxes and quarantine similar messages.

steps.title: Block Sender and Malicious URLs
steps.description: Add sender to blocklist and blacklist any malicious URLs at firewall/proxy level.

steps.title: Check for Compromises
steps.description: Identify users who clicked links or opened attachments. Scan for malware and check for credential compromise.

steps.title: Reset Compromised Credentials
steps.description: Force password resets for affected users and enable MFA if not already active.

steps.title: User Notification
steps.description: Send security alert to all employees warning about the phishing campaign.

steps.title: Security Awareness Training
steps.description: Conduct targeted training for affected users on identifying phishing attempts.

steps.title: Report to Authorities
steps.description: Report phishing campaign to relevant authorities (FBI IC3, Anti-Phishing Working Group).

name: Data Breach Response
description: Comprehensive data breach incident response following GDPR and privacy regulations

steps.title: Contain the Breach
steps.description: Immediately stop unauthorized access. Disable compromised accounts and close attack vectors.

steps.title: Activate Breach Response Team
steps.description: Assemble incident response team including IT, Legal, PR, and Executive leadership.

steps.title: Assess Breach Scope
steps.description: Determine what data was accessed, how many records affected, and sensitivity of data.

steps.title: Preserve Evidence
steps.description: Collect and preserve all evidence including logs, forensic images, and network captures.

steps.title: Legal Review and Notification Requirements
steps.description: Determine legal obligations for breach notification under GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, etc.

steps.title: Notify Regulatory Authorities
steps.description: Report breach to required authorities within mandated timeframes (72 hours for GDPR).

steps.title: Notify Affected Individuals
steps.description: Prepare and send notification to affected individuals with details and remediation steps.

steps.title: Public Communication
steps.description: Prepare public statement and FAQ. Coordinate with PR team on messaging.

steps.title: Offer Credit Monitoring
steps.description: Arrange credit monitoring services for affected individuals if PII was compromised.

steps.title: Remediation and Prevention
steps.description: Fix vulnerabilities, enhance security controls, and implement measures to prevent recurrence.

name: DDoS Attack Mitigation
description: Response procedures for Distributed Denial of Service attacks

steps.title: Confirm DDoS Attack
steps.description: Verify traffic patterns, analyze network logs, and confirm attack is DDoS.

steps.title: Contact ISP/DDoS Mitigation Provider
steps.description: Immediately contact ISP and DDoS mitigation service to activate protection.

steps.title: Enable DDoS Protection
steps.description: Activate CDN, load balancers, and traffic filtering to absorb and filter attack traffic.

steps.title: Analyze Attack Vectors
steps.description: Identify attack type (volumetric, application layer, protocol) and source IPs.

steps.title: Implement Rate Limiting
steps.description: Configure rate limiting and traffic shaping to protect critical services.

steps.title: Business Continuity Assessment
steps.description: Assess impact on business operations and activate continuity plans if needed.

steps.title: Monitor and Adjust
steps.description: Continuously monitor attack patterns and adjust mitigation strategies as needed.

steps.title: Document Incident
steps.description: Record attack timeline, mitigation steps, and effectiveness for post-incident analysis.

name: Insider Threat Response
description: Procedures for responding to malicious or negligent insider threats

steps.title: Verify Threat Indicators
steps.description: Review logs, access patterns, and data movement to confirm suspicious insider activity.

steps.title: Consult Legal and HR
steps.description: Immediately involve legal counsel and HR to ensure compliance with employment laws.

steps.title: Preserve Evidence
steps.description: Collect evidence including logs, emails, file access records without alerting the suspect.

steps.title: Assess Data Exfiltration
steps.description: Determine what data was accessed, copied, or transmitted outside the organization.

steps.title: Restrict Access
steps.description: Revoke suspect's access to systems, networks, and physical facilities.

steps.title: Conduct Investigation
steps.description: Perform detailed investigation with HR, Legal, and potentially external forensics team.

steps.title: Employee Interview
steps.description: HR and Legal conduct formal interview with the employee if appropriate.

steps.title: Determine Actions
steps.description: Decide on disciplinary action, termination, or legal prosecution based on findings.

steps.title: Remediation
steps.description: Enhance monitoring, implement DLP solutions, and improve access controls.
